details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectories reports/audit/ and reports/board/ per governance contract.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ directory is missing. reports/audit/ exists and .cursor/automations/ exists with README + specs. memory_bank/ has key docs.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active Python code (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py). Scripts referencing moltbot found: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. Board JSON files also reference moltbot/clawdbot: board/eod/out/2026-02-12/cron_diagnosis.json, board/eod/out/2026-02-13/cron_diagnosis.json, board/eod/out/2026-02-12/eod_failure.json. Files in reports/audit/ and docs/ documenting removal were excluded per policy.
